tluaColonCallPackTail.tlua(15,13): error TLUA2554: Expected 1 arguments, but got 2.


==== tluaColonCallPackTail.tlua (1 errors) ====
    interface Reader {
      pair(self: Reader): (number, string);
      sum(self: Reader, ...: number): number;
      one(self: Reader, n: number): number;
    }
    declare reader: Reader;
    declare function takesNumberString(a: number, b: string): void;
    declare function takesNumber(a: number): void;
    declare function makeReader(): Reader;
    
    // A colon call in tail argument position contributes its full pack.
    takesNumberString(reader:pair());
    
    // So a one-parameter target overflows on the expanded pack.
    takesNumber(reader:pair());
                ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2554: Expected 1 arguments, but got 2.
    
    // In non-tail position it adjusts to its single first value.
    takesNumberString(reader:pair(), "s");
    
    // The vararg tail flows through the colon call's own argument list.
    function forward(...: number): number
      return reader:sum(...);
    end
    
    // A call receiver adjusts to its single value before becoming the implicit
    // first argument: `makeReader():one(1)` passes one Reader, not a pack.
    local n = makeReader():one(1);
